<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Filesystem\Exception; /** * Exception class thrown when a filesystem operation failure happens. * * @author Romain Neutron <imprec@gmail.com> * @author Christian Gärtner <christiangaertner.film@googlemail.com> * @author Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> */ class IOException extends \RuntimeException implements IOExceptionInterface { public function __construct( string $message, int $code = 0, ?\Throwable $previous = null, private ?string $path = null, ) { parent::__construct($message, $code, $previous); } public function getPath(): ?string { return $this->path; } }
